use_codes.desc: TWICE DAILY TOPICAL TREATMENT OF MODERATE TO SEVERE PLAQUE PSORIASIS.

indications.text:
8.5 Geriatric Use
1.1 Indication
10 OVERDOSAGE
1.2 Limitations of Use
11 DESCRIPTION

1.1 Indication
CLOBEX® Spray, 0.05% is a super-high potent topical corticosteroid formulation indicated for the treatment of moderate to
severe plaque psoriasis affecting up to 20% body surface area (BSA) in patients 18 years of age or older.
Patients should be instructed to use CLOBEX® Spray, 0.05%...
